examples: The house was full of the rank smell of urine.
The doctor took a urine sample and a blood sample.
Wherever you go, feces, urine, blood, vomit, rotten flesh and most meat will be disgusting.
The Dutch-designed devices keep approximately 10, 000 gallons of urine off the streets a year.
In the first few days, urine samples are useful to look for exposure to chemical agents.
